comment: A snack is a small service of food and generally eaten between meals. Snacks come in a variety of forms including packaged snack foods and other processed foods, as well as items made from fresh ingredients at home. Beverages, such as coffee, are not generally considered snacks although they may be consumed along with or in lieu of snack foods. A snack eaten shortly before going to bed or during the night may be called a "bedtime snack", "late night snack", or "(mid)night snack".
label: Snack
